XLC.description: Tracks the Communication Services Select Sector Index of the S&P 500, giving targeted exposure to telecom, media, entertainment and interactive-media companies.

VOX.description: Tracks the MSCI US Investable Market Communication Services 25/50 Index; includes large-, mid-, and small-cap communication services stocks.

FCOM.description: Tracks the MSCI USA IMI Communication Services 25/50 Index and holds roughly 100 stocks, including small caps, for diversified exposure.

XLY.description: Replicates the Consumer Discretionary Select Sector Index of the S&P 500, targeting industries like retail, leisure and autos.

VCR.description: Tracks the MSCI US Investable Market Consumer Discretionary 25/50 Index with multicap exposure across the sector.

FDIS.description: Follows the MSCI USA IMI Consumer Discretionary 25/50 Index and invests at least 80% of assets in U.S. consumer discretionary stocks.

XLP.description: Replicates the Consumer Staples Select Sector Index, targeting S&P 500 staples such as food, beverages, household products and personal care.

VDC.description: Tracks the MSCI US Investable Market Consumer Staples 25/50 Index, offering broad multicap exposure to staples producers.

IYK.description: Tracks the Russell 1000 Consumer Staples RIC 22.5/45 Capped Index for diversified exposure to U.S. food, beverage and household goods producers.

XLE.description: Replicates the Energy Select Sector Index of the S&P 500, providing targeted exposure to oil, gas, consumable fuels and energy equipment & services.

VDE.description: Tracks the MSCI US Investable Market Energy 25/50 Index across large-, mid- and small-cap U.S. energy companies.

IXC.description: Follows a global energy index, giving diversified exposure to energy stocks worldwide.

XLF.description: Replicates the Financial Select Sector Index, targeting S&P 500 financials including banks, insurers, capital markets and consumer finance.

VFH.description: Tracks the MSCI US Investable Market Financials 25/50 Index with multicap coverage of U.S. financial companies.

IYF.description: Tracks an index of U.S. financials equities, offering diversified exposure to banks, insurers and credit card companies.

XLV.description: Replicates the Health Care Select Sector Index, targeting S&P 500 health care firms including pharmaceuticals, medical devices, providers and biotech.

VHT.description: Tracks the MSCI US Investable Market Health Care 25/50 Index with broad multicap exposure to the U.S. health care sector.

IXJ.description: Tracks a global health care index and provides diversified exposure to pharmaceutical, biotechnology and medical device companies worldwide.

XLI.description: Replicates the Industrial Select Sector Index, targeting S&P 500 industrials such as aerospace & defense, machinery and transportation.

VIS.description: Tracks the MSCI US Investable Market Industrials 25/50 Index across large-, mid- and small-cap industrial companies.

IYJ.description: Tracks a U.S. industrials index to provide diversified access to manufacturing, services and transportation companies.

XLK.description: Replicates the Technology Select Sector Index, giving targeted exposure to hardware, software, communications equipment, semiconductors and IT services.

VGT.description: Tracks the MSCI US Investable Market Information Technology 25/50 Index, offering multicap exposure across technology software, hardware and semiconductor companies.

FTEC.description: Tracks the MSCI USA IMI Information Technology 25/50 Index, providing diversified exposure to U.S. IT companies across market caps.

XLB.description: Tracks the S&P Materials Select Sector Index, giving targeted exposure to materials stocks within the S&P 500.

VAW.description: Tracks the MSCI US Investable Market Materials 25/50 Index and offers multicap exposure to U.S. materials companies in chemicals, construction materials, metals, and more.

IYM.description: Tracks a U.S. basic materials index, providing diversified exposure to companies producing raw materials such as metals, chemicals and forestry products.

VNQ.description: Provides broad exposure to the U.S. real estate market by investing in REITs across diverse property sectors.

IYR.description: Provides comprehensive coverage of U.S. real estate companies and REITs.

SCHH.description: Tracks a market-cap-weighted index of U.S. REITs, offering broad real estate exposure at a low expense ratio.

XLU.description: Replicates the Utilities Select Sector Index, targeting S&P 500 utilities such as electric, water and multi-utilities, power producers and gas companies.

VPU.description: Tracks the MSCI US Investable Market Utilities 25/50 Index, providing multicap exposure to electric, gas and water utilities as well as independent power producers.

IDU.description: Tracks an index of U.S. utilities equities, offering diversified exposure to companies supplying electricity, gas and water.
